headline: INTU Stock: Where Compounding Could Take The Price
summary: At $273.38, Intuit (INTU) looks set up for roughly 41% of upside over the next three years under a conservative scenario. Not a moonshot, but enough to matter if the math holds. Revenue compounding does all the work; the multiple is asked to do nothing. Here is the operational reality the math is built on.
